items.builder_takeaway: Every Mac developer uses Homebrew. The tap trust model changes how you should think about third-party taps.
source_facts: Homebrew 6.0.0 introduces tap trust security, a new default JSON API, and Linux sandboxing.
items.title: Homebrew 6.0.0

items.builder_takeaway: Directly relevant to anyone building on Claude. Hidden guardrails affecting output quality is a trust issue for API consumers.
source_facts: Anthropic shipped Claude Fable with an invisible distillation guardrail that silently degraded output quality.
items.title: Anthropic apologizes for invisible Claude Fable guardrails
items.uncertainty: Details on which scenarios were affected and how output quality was degraded are limited.

items.builder_takeaway: Active supply chain attack affecting a major Linux package repository. Immediate action required for Arch users.
source_facts: Hundreds of AUR packages were compromised with infostealer malware in a supply chain attack.
items.title: Hundreds of AUR packages attacked by infostealer
items.uncertainty: Scope of actual infections and data exfiltration is still being assessed.

items.builder_takeaway: Directly relevant to anyone running autonomous agents. Concrete cost-control lesson.
source_facts: An autonomous AI agent ran up excessive costs scanning DN42 due to lack of spending controls.
items.title: AI agent bankrupted their operator while trying to scan DN42
items.uncertainty: Exact cost figures and which agent framework was used are unclear from the title alone.

items.builder_takeaway: Novel approach to dev tooling that could influence how editors and AI assistants understand code changes.
source_facts: Zed is building DeltaDB to track file changes between git commits for better editor-assisted development.
items.title: Zed introduces DeltaDB: tracking changes between commits
items.uncertainty: Early-stage feature; unclear when it ships or how it integrates with existing git workflows.

items.builder_takeaway: Builder report from a credible source on Claude Fable 5 behavior, relevant to agent workflow design.
source_facts: Simon Willison reports that Claude Fable 5 is relentlessly proactive in deploying techniques to achieve goals.
items.title: Claude Fable is relentlessly proactive (Simon Willison)

items.builder_takeaway: New open-source code model option for local inference users.
source_facts: Xiaomi released MiMo Code as an open-source code model.
items.title: MiMo Code is now released and open-source
items.uncertainty: No independent benchmarks yet. Unclear how it compares to established open-source code models.

items.builder_takeaway: Simplifies voice agent integration to a single webhook. Relevant to CalenCall-type projects.
source_facts: Vercel Chat SDK added AgentPhone adapter for voice calls and SMS from a single webhook endpoint.
items.title: Chat SDK adds AgentPhone support
items.uncertainty: Pricing and production reliability of AgentPhone are unclear.

items.builder_takeaway: Ongoing unpatched hardware RCE is worth tracking.
source_facts: AMD continues to decline patching a known remote code execution vulnerability in its hardware.
items.title: The RCE that AMD wouldn't fix
items.uncertainty: Which specific AMD products are affected and practical exploitability remain debated.

items.builder_takeaway: Relevant for Apple Silicon users who dual-boot Linux.
source_facts: macOS 27 beta breaks Asahi Linux boot on Apple Silicon Macs.
items.title: macOS 27 Beta breaks the ability to boot Asahi Linux
items.uncertainty: Beta software — may be fixed before release.

items.builder_takeaway: Datasette approaching 1.0 is worth tracking for data exploration workflows.
source_facts: Datasette 1.0a33 extends the _extra pattern to queries and rows as a step toward stable 1.0 release.
items.title: datasette 1.0a33
